title: Front Office Manager - Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners:
Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners!
